## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature / improvement

## Security Checklist

Before submitting, confirm ALL of the following:

- [ ] I have **NOT** committed any `.env.local`, `.env`, or secret files
- [ ] I have **NOT** hardcoded any IP addresses, passwords, or tokens in source code
- [ ] I have **NOT** committed any `*.pem`, `*.key`, or certificate files
- [ ] If I changed deployment scripts — I have tested them locally first
- [ ] If I changed security config (Caddyfile, UFW, RBAC) — the owner (@Binhchuoizzz) has been notified

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/unit`
- [ ] Manually tested against a running stack (if applicable)
